pi_items.source: Task description and setup scripts that download and load the sakila sample database.
Task description explicitly requires this username.
Task description explicitly requires this user host.
Task description explicitly specifies this password.
Task description and export_result.sh evaluation script.
Downloaded the MySQL Sakila sample database from downloads.mysql.com and verified the customer table INSERT statement contains exactly 599 rows.

privileged_info_summary: The target database is the standard MySQL sakila sample database, which contains 599 customer records. The task requires creating two views ('v_film_revenue_by_store' and 'v_customer_lifetime_value') and a read-only user ('reporter'@'localhost' with password 'Report2024!'). The final data export must be written to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/customer_lifetime_value.csv'.
